question: Compare McLaren drivers Norris and Piastri
answer:
McLaren intra-team comparison — Norris vs Piastri 2025:
• Points: Norris 394 vs Piastri 381 (13-point gap)
• Wins: Norris 7 vs Piastri 7 (tied)
• Podiums: Norris 18 vs Piastri 16 (Norris ahead)
• Poles: Norris 7 vs Piastri 6 (Norris ahead)
• Best lap: Piastri 67.924s vs Norris 68.272s (Piastri faster)
• Avg lap: Piastri 88.177s vs Norris 88.510s (Piastri faster)

Verdict: Norris edges the championship thanks to converting slightly more poles to wins. But Piastri's raw lap times are marginally superior — the gap is smaller than the points suggest.
